---
title: "ランダム抽選器"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

読書会など，参加者の中から一人をランダムに選ぶための簡易ツールです。
すべてブラウザ内で動作し，名前データはどこにも送信されません。

```{=html}
<style>
  .lottery-wrap {
    max-width: 720px;
    margin: 1em auto;
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "Yu Gothic", sans-serif;
  }
  .lottery-wrap textarea {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 180px;
    font-size: 1.1em;
    padding: 0.6em;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 6px;
  }
  .lottery-btns {
    margin: 0.8em 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.5em;
  }
  .lottery-btns button {
    font-size: 1em;
    padding: 0.6em 1.2em;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    background: #4a6fa5;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .lottery-btns button.secondary {
    background: #888;
  }
  .lottery-btns button.danger {
    background: #b94a48;
  }
  .lottery-btns button:disabled {
    background: #ccc;
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }
  .lottery-roster {
    margin: 1em 0;
    padding: 0.8em;
    background: #f6f6f6;
    border-radius: 6px;
    min-height: 2.4em;
  }
  .lottery-roster .chip {
    display: inline-block;
    margin: 0.2em 0.3em;
    padding: 0.25em 0.7em;
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 0.95em;
  }
  .lottery-roster .chip.used {
    opacity: 0.35;
    text-decoration: line-through;
  }
  .lottery-result {
    margin: 1.2em 0;
    padding: 1.2em;
    text-align: center;
    background: #fffbe6;
    border: 2px solid #f0c850;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 3em;
    font-weight: bold;
    min-height: 1.6em;
    transition: transform 0.15s;
  }
  .lottery-result.spinning {
    transform: scale(1.03);
    color: #888;
  }
  .lottery-options {
    margin: 0.6em 0;
    font-size: 0.95em;
    color: #555;
  }
  .lottery-status {
    font-size: 0.9em;
    color: #777;
    margin-top: 0.4em;
  }
</style>

<div class="lottery-wrap">
  <h3>1. 参加者の名前を入力</h3>
  <p>1行に1人ずつ。コピペ可。空行や前後の空白は無視されます。</p>
  <textarea id="lot-input" placeholder="山田 太郎&#10;鈴木 花子&#10;田中 次郎"></textarea>

  <div class="lottery-btns">
    <button id="lot-confirm">この名簿で確定</button>
    <button id="lot-edit" class="secondary" disabled>編集に戻る</button>
    <button id="lot-reset-all" class="danger">全リセット</button>
  </div>

  <h3>2. 名簿</h3>
  <div id="lot-roster" class="lottery-roster">（未確定）</div>

  <div class="lottery-options">
    <label>
      <input type="checkbox" id="lot-exclude-used" checked>
      一度当たった人は次回から除外する
    </label>
  </div>

  <h3>3. 抽選</h3>
  <div id="lot-result" class="lottery-result">―</div>

  <div class="lottery-btns">
    <button id="lot-draw" disabled>抽選！</button>
    <button id="lot-reset-history" class="secondary" disabled>当選履歴だけリセット</button>
  </div>

  <div id="lot-status" class="lottery-status"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const $input = document.getElementById("lot-input");
  const $confirm = document.getElementById("lot-confirm");
  const $edit = document.getElementById("lot-edit");
  const $resetAll = document.getElementById("lot-reset-all");
  const $roster = document.getElementById("lot-roster");
  const $exclude = document.getElementById("lot-exclude-used");
  const $result = document.getElementById("lot-result");
  const $draw = document.getElementById("lot-draw");
  const $resetHist = document.getElementById("lot-reset-history");
  const $status = document.getElementById("lot-status");

  let roster = [];
  let used = new Set();
  let confirmed = false;
  let spinning = false;

  function renderRoster() {
    if (roster.length === 0) {
      $roster.textContent = "（未確定）";
      return;
    }
    $roster.innerHTML = "";
    roster.forEach((name) => {
      const span = document.createElement("span");
      span.className = "chip" + (used.has(name) ? " used" : "");
      span.textContent = name;
      $roster.appendChild(span);
    });
  }

  function updateStatus() {
    if (!confirmed) {
      $status.textContent = "";
      return;
    }
    const remaining = roster.filter((n) => !used.has(n)).length;
    $status.textContent = `登録 ${roster.length} 名 / 未当選 ${remaining} 名 / 当選済 ${used.size} 名`;
  }

  function pool() {
    return $exclude.checked
      ? roster.filter((n) => !used.has(n))
      : roster.slice();
  }

  $confirm.addEventListener("click", () => {
    const lines = $input.value
      .split(/\r?\n/)
      .map((s) => s.trim())
      .filter((s) => s.length > 0);
    const unique = Array.from(new Set(lines));
    if (unique.length === 0) {
      alert("名前が入力されていません。");
      return;
    }
    roster = unique;
    used = new Set();
    confirmed = true;
    $input.disabled = true;
    $confirm.disabled = true;
    $edit.disabled = false;
    $draw.disabled = false;
    $resetHist.disabled = false;
    $result.textContent = "―";
    renderRoster();
    updateStatus();
  });

  $edit.addEventListener("click", () => {
    $input.disabled = false;
    $confirm.disabled = false;
    $edit.disabled = true;
    $draw.disabled = true;
    $resetHist.disabled = true;
    confirmed = false;
    $status.textContent = "編集モードです。確定し直してください。";
  });

  $resetAll.addEventListener("click", () => {
    if (!confirm("名簿も当選履歴もすべて消します。よろしいですか？")) return;
    $input.value = "";
    $input.disabled = false;
    roster = [];
    used = new Set();
    confirmed = false;
    $confirm.disabled = false;
    $edit.disabled = true;
    $draw.disabled = true;
    $resetHist.disabled = true;
    $result.textContent = "―";
    renderRoster();
    updateStatus();
  });

  $resetHist.addEventListener("click", () => {
    used = new Set();
    $result.textContent = "―";
    renderRoster();
    updateStatus();
  });

  $draw.addEventListener("click", () => {
    if (spinning) return;
    const candidates = pool();
    if (candidates.length === 0) {
      alert("候補がいません。「当選履歴だけリセット」を押すか，除外チェックを外してください。");
      return;
    }

    spinning = true;
    $draw.disabled = true;
    $result.classList.add("spinning");

    const spinDuration = 1200;
    const tickInterval = 70;
    const startedAt = Date.now();

    const ticker = setInterval(() => {
      const pick = candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
      $result.textContent = pick;
      if (Date.now() - startedAt >= spinDuration) {
        clearInterval(ticker);
        const buf = new Uint32Array(1);
        crypto.getRandomValues(buf);
        const idx = buf[0] % candidates.length;
        const finalPick = candidates[idx];
        $result.textContent = finalPick;
        $result.classList.remove("spinning");
        used.add(finalPick);
        renderRoster();
        updateStatus();
        spinning = false;
        $draw.disabled = false;
      }
    }, tickInterval);
  });

  renderRoster();
})();
</script>
```
